away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Marine Fauthoux
players.injury_comment: This will be Fauthoux's second straight game on the sidelines. Her next chance to play will come Friday against the Mystics.

players.name: Betnijah Laney-Hamilton
players.injury_comment: Laney-Hamilton is dealing with some soreness in her left knee after undergoing a preplanned injection, so she'll sit out Wednesday's game, which should open up minutes for Marine Johannes, Rebekah Gardner and Pauline Astier. For what it's worth, head coach Chris DeMarco said he's hopeful that Laney-Hamilton will be able to return for Friday's meeting with the Mystics.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: DiJonai Carrington
players.injury_comment: Carrington underwent left foot surgery in April and there's been no indication that she's close to making her season debut.

players.name: Rickea Jackson
players.injury_comment: The season-ending knee injury is a devastating development for Jackson and the Sky, as the 25-year-old forward was well on her way to a career-best campaign. Through Chicago's first four games, Jackson averaged 18.0 points, 4.8 rebounds, 2.0 assists, 1.8 blocks and 1.5 three-pointers in 29.5 minutes per contest. After Jackson's early exit in Sunday's contest, Aicha Coulibaly opened the second half with the starters and looks to be the most likely candidate to move into the top unit for the Sky's next game Wednesday versus the Wings.

players.name: Courtney Vandersloot
players.injury_comment: Vandersloot is still recovering from the right knee surgery she underwent last June to repair a torn ACL, and there's been no indication that she's close to a return.

players.name: Maddy Westbeld
players.injury_comment: Westbeld is signed to a developmental contract, though she hasn't stepped on the floor yet this season. She is eligible to appear in 12 regular-season contests. Westbeld's next opportunity to suit up will come Saturday in Dallas.
